reviews.comment:
Lento para cargar combustible. Y si llega a parar un micro con de linea, no podés comprar nada en el minimercado porque se llena de personas. Los baños están totalmente suscios. Lo único bueno es que existe y es una posibilidad aparente

(Translated by Google)
It's slow to refuel. And if a regular bus does stop, you can't buy anything at the convenience store because it gets packed. The bathrooms are filthy. The only good thing is that it exists and is a viable option.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJem9lcndRRRAB
